title: Validate HAL GNSS snapshot on physical boards
description: Hardware validation deferred from project-LICHEN-t2hn.6.3. The no-hardware slice added board-agnostic location/time snapshots and synthetic tests, but real GNSS providers still need validation on actual target boards with GNSS hardware, including fix source, satellites, altitude, and Unix fix time. Requires physical boards/radios/GNSS lock, so skip in no-hardware loops.
acceptance_criteria: On a physical GNSS-capable target, confirm HAL snapshot reports provider availability only when configured hardware is present, sets lat/lon/alt/satellites/fix_time validity from a real fix, never maps uptime to Unix/GPS time, and document any board-specific caveats.
